name: find_fit_investors
description: Rank which investors fit a live deal (mandate criteria match: sector, geography, ticket size, instrument). Returns up to 8 matches with reasons and warnings, and notes which already have an engagement on this deal. Excluded and greylisted investors are never returned. Read-only — introducing an investor to the deal is a human decision.

deal.description: The live transaction/deal to match investors against — name as the user said it, or an exact id
